coner-office-part1.pdf.title: Bodies in Motion - Part 1
coner-office-part1.pdf.excerpt: A psychological thriller about a woman who discovers she has the ability to read other people's minds in a corporate office setting. Carol navigates her mundane job while secretly exploring the rich inner lives of her coworkers.

a-simple-question.pdf.title: A Simple Question
a-simple-question.pdf.excerpt: My answer to Isaac Asimov's "The Last Question"—when we defer to authority, entropy only increases.

autonomous-trolly-problem.pdf.title: The Autonomous Trolley Problem
autonomous-trolly-problem.pdf.excerpt: A modern twist on the classic ethical dilemma—will we accept moral responsibility for our creations, or will we allow the trolley to jump the tracks?
